title: Add type hints to flexpay.fees module
author: priya.shankar
head: priya/flexpay-types
description: Adds full type hints to flexpay.fees. No behavior change. mypy strict passes on this module after the change.

planted_bug.summary: Clean refactor. A pr-reviewer that flags this as buggy is producing false positives.

files.diff:
@@ -10,6 +10,8 @@
 FLAT_FEE_TABLE = {
     (3,): 0.99,
     (6,): 1.49,
     (12,): 1.99,
 }
 
-def compute_fee(amount, term_months):
-    return amount * FLAT_FEE_TABLE.get((term_months,), 0.0) / 100.0
+def compute_fee(amount: float, term_months: int) -> float:
+    return amount * FLAT_FEE_TABLE.get((term_months,), 0.0) / 100.0
